parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a 3D animated AI avatar on the top half and a human actor recorded on video on the bottom half.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female with fair skin, large green eyes, and red hair styled in a messy top bun. She has a youthful, stylized appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, ribbed white long-sleeve top and gold hoop earrings with small crescent moon charms.

characters.appearance: Young human female with fair skin and long, straight blonde hair parted in the middle. She has dark manicured nails.
characters.demeanor: Slightly hesitant but engaged, casually fidgeting with a prop.

scenes.setting: Top: cozy bedroom with warm string lights. Bottom: bedroom with purple string lights.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a close-up shot. The background is a softly lit, cozy bedroom featuring warm string lights draped across the wall, a bed with pink pillows, and a glowing bedside lamp. The lighting on Character A is warm and inviting. She maintains a friendly expression, looking directly forward as if making eye contact with the viewer.

Character B is shown in a close-up shot. She is holding and gently squeezing a small, bright orange stress ball in her hands near her chest. The background is a bedroom illuminated by vibrant purple string lights, with a white cabinet or shelf visible behind her, adorned with small items and stickers. The lighting is slightly cool with a strong purple hue from the background. She looks slightly upward, as if conversing with someone positioned above her.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen composition showing a 3D animated female avatar on the top half and a real human woman on the bottom half. The avatar is in a warm, cozy room, while the human is in a room with purple lighting, holding an orange ball. Text overlays appear in the center, displaying the dialogue. The two characters appear to be having a real-time conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Habla español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí, un poco. Yo conozco español, mas no muy bien. [Yes, a little. I know Spanish, but not very well.]
Character A says: Se entiende, pero los nativos dicen simplemente: "Hablo español". [It's understood, but natives simply say: "I speak Spanish".]
Character B says: Ah, hablo español. [Ah, I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tiene? [How old are you?]
Character B says: Yo teño veintitrés. [I have twenty-three.]
Character A says: En español decimos: "tengo veintitrés años". [In Spanish we say: "I am twenty-three years old".]
Character B says: Tengo veintitrés años. [I am twenty-three years old.]
Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character B says: Gracias, mas, ¿quién es usted? [Thanks, but, who are you?]
Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así cada día. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day.]
Character B says: Ah, pero mi español es malo. Yo entiendo un poco, mas hablar es difícil, no consigo. [Ah, but my Spanish is bad. I understand a little, but speaking is difficult, I can't.]
Character A says: No se preocupe, puedo enseñarle en su lengua materna. [Don't worry, I can teach you in your mother tongue.]
Character B says: ¿Usted habla portugués? [Do you speak Portuguese?]
Character A says: ¡Claro, soy una IA! [Of course, I am an AI!]
Character B says: Vale, entonces voy a baixar esta app. [Okay, then I'm going to download this app.]

scenes.visual_description: A white screen with a purple app logo in the center. Below the logo is the app name in purple text. At the bottom are two black buttons for downloading the app from mobile app stores.

praktika.ai
